headlines.title: Trump attends dignified transfer of 4 service members killed in Iran attacks since the ceasefire ended
headlines.description: President Donald Trump on Wednesday attended the dignified transfer of the remains of four service members killed in Iranian attacks this month after hostilities ramped up following the collapse of the ceasefire.

headlines.title: Pete Hegseth Estimates US War With Iran Has Cost $37.5B So Far
headlines.description: The United States launched yet another round of airstrikes against the Iranian regime Tuesday, just hours after the Pentagon asked Congress for an additional $67 billion to support the ongoing conflict. “We’re not finished at all,” President Donald Trump said of the war. NBC’s Garrett Haake reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Send your questions for Richard Engel on the war with Iran and more
headlines.description: The United States is about to enter its fifth month of war with Iran, and NBC News’ chief foreign correspondent Richard Engel has been covering all the developments.

headlines.title: Trump approves landmark U.S.-Saudi nuclear deal
headlines.description: President Donald Trump has approved a landmark civilian nuclear deal between the United States and Saudi Arabia that is expected to be announced Wednesday, a senior administration official told NBC News.

headlines.title: Oil surges past $95 as U.S. downplays Iran diplomacy and 2nd key trade route is disrupted
headlines.description: The price of oil surged nearly 5% Wednesday as U.S. officials talked down new peace talks. Major disruptions now face two of the world’s key supply routes.

headlines.title: Trump speaks at Atlanta area high school
headlines.description: Watch live coverage as President Donald Trump speaks at Wheeler High School in Marietta, Georgia.

headlines.title: Trump-backed Rep. Andy Biggs wins GOP primary for Arizona governor
headlines.description: NBC News projects that Biggs defeated fellow Rep. David Schweikert to move on to the general election against Democratic Gov. Katie Hobbs.

headlines.title: Democratic leaders’ pick trails in Arizona primary for a key battleground district
headlines.description: Democrat Amish Shah, a physician and former state lawmaker, has opened a lead in the primary for a key Arizona battleground district despite party leaders backing another candidate.

headlines.title: Alexander Kolodin, who tried to overturn Arizona election results, wins GOP nod for secretary of state
headlines.description: Kolodin will face Democratic incumbent Adrian Fontes after defeating former state Republican Party chair Gina Swoboda, NBC News projects.

headlines.title: Attorney Ben Crump presents Nolan Wells’ independent autopsy results
headlines.description: Preliminary findings from Nolan Wells’ independent autopsy showed that his cause of death was “undetermined” pending further investigation. NBC News’ Aaron Gilchrist reports on how soon information from the autopsy of the Jackson County Coroner's office could be accessed.

headlines.title: Ukraine targets Russian online retailer Wildberries
headlines.description: Ukrainian long-range drones targeted large warehouses belonging to Wildberries, Russia’s equivalent of Amazon, which sells military equipment like body armor and drone parts, but mainly serves as a place for regular Russians to sell their goods. President Zelenskyy said the warehouses are “involved in supplying the Russian army,” adding that Ukraine is “brining the war home – to Russia.”

headlines.title: We want to hear how Medicaid work requirements are affecting you
headlines.description: If you have lost your health coverage or are at risk of losing it, tell us your story.
